test_strategy: Two-script harness: (1) static-checks.js does source-grep and file-structure assertions against output/integration/ — covers all check_type ∈ {dom_selector_exists, dom_text_contains, source_grep, file_structure, dom_selector_count, css_inspection, network_request_body_inspection (by source-grep proxy), module_export_exists}; (2) derivers-tests.js dynamically imports js/data-derivers.js under Node and exercises the pure functions with concrete inputs and expected outputs.
production_fidelity_note: Live api.github.com calls and browser-runtime DOM assertions (MCA.api-client.2/3/4, MCA.ui-shell.5, DCA.FC1/FC4/A2, PNV.1) are marked not_exercised_in_static_mode and deferred to CV Tier 2. Real browser execution against a real PAT is required to fulfill those, and Node cannot simulate it without a full browser stack.
